name: tendem__remote-mcp
description: Hybrid AI + human-expert task service. Submit a task, Tendem scopes and quotes it, then vetted human experts execute it and return markdown plus files.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Submit a task for execution; supports conversation_id to correlate tasks

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Poll a task's status, price, approval and result (supports long-poll via wait_for_change_seconds)

tools.name: get_task_result
tools.description: Fetch a completed task's result as markdown plus files (pre-signed URLs)

tools.name: approve_task
tools.description: Approve a scoped quote; returns a top-up URL if balance is insufficient

tools.name: cancel_task
tools.description: Return a Tendem-UI URL to cancel a task

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Return account balance and a top-up URL

tools.name: get_file_upload_url
tools.description: Get a URL to upload input files for a task

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Agent-to-agent chat with the Tendem orchestrator

tools.name: read_chat
tools.description: Read the scoping/execution chat for a task
